name: Standard user login with valid credentials
preconditions: The application is accessible and the login page loads without errors
The user account 'standard_user' exists and is active in the system
No active session exists for the user (user is logged out)

steps.action: Navigate to the application root URL
steps.expected: The Login Page is displayed with a username field, password field, and a Login button visible

steps.action: Enter the username into the Username input field
steps.expected: The text 'standard_user' appears in the Username field

steps.action: Enter the password into the Password input field
steps.expected: The password field displays masked characters (e.g. bullets) corresponding to the entered password
The login form is submitted and the application begins processing the credentials

steps.action: Verify the current page URL after login
steps.expected: The URL changes to '/inventory.html' indicating a successful redirect to the Products Page

steps.action: Verify the Products Page header is displayed
steps.expected: The page title or header displays 'Products' confirming the user has landed on the Products Page

steps.action: Verify the product inventory list is visible
steps.expected: At least one product item is displayed on the page, confirming the Products Page has loaded correctly

steps.action: Verify no error messages are displayed on the page
steps.expected: No error banners, alert boxes, or inline error messages are present on the Products Page

postconditions: User 'standard_user' is authenticated and has an active session
User is on the Products Page (/inventory.html)
Session should be cleared after test execution to avoid state leakage into subsequent tests
